movie.actors: Sean Astin, Brendan Fraser, Pauly Shore, Megan Ward
movie.plot: When they find a frozen caveman in their back yard, two high school outcasts thaw him and introduce him to modern life while he in turn gets them to actually enjoy life.
movie.title: Encino Man
movie.writer: George Zaloom (story), Shawn Schepps (story), Shawn Schepps (screenplay)
